title: 6cm K9 Solar System Crystal Ball with LED Rotatable Base Planets Space Model Glass Sphere Ornament Gifts for Astronomy Men
features: 【Perfect Gift for Astronomy Enthusiasts】This complex 3D solar system crystal ball shows us the precisely marked solar system, and the names of each planet are laser-engraved inside the crystal. It is very suitable to be given as a space gift on birthdays, parties, Christmas, Halloween, and other festivals, to astronomers, teachers, daughter, son, mum, dad, students, astronomy enthusiasts and space dreamers of all ages

【Material and Craftsmanship】This exquisite solar system crystal ball is crafted from pure K9 crystal, and the size of it is 6cm. The core highlight lies in the application of advanced 3D laser engraving technology to carve out a scene within the crystal. The internal pattern of this solar system crystal ball is clear and never fades, and it is sturdy and durable, not easy to wear out

【Unique Base Design】This solar system crystal ball is placed on a fine-textured plastic base that imitates wood grain, and the realistic wood grain effect exudes the warmth of nature. Base specially designed for smooth rotation can be 360 degreesand with warm LED light, allowing you to easily adjust the angle, from each position to appreciate the pattern

【Charming 3D Night Light and Decor】Each ball comes with a base that has a wire that you can easily connect to a power source to make it work. You can decor your any space such as a bedroom, office, dormitory, or living room. With the change of environment, light, and angle, the solar system will present a rich variety of light and shadow beauty

【Gift-Ready】This mysterious solar system crystal ball is packaged in a beautiful gift box. This is a thoughtful gift for anyone who loves astronomy. The box is thoughtfully included a soft cleaning cloth and a blank gift card
description: This exquisite K9 crystal ball uses advanced 3D laser technology to engrave the pattern of the solar system. Every angle reveals mesmerizing depth through its 360° smooth-rotation wood-grain base. The dynamic shadows dance as light shifts, creating a captivating and ever-changing beauty The gift box comes with a cleaning cloth and a blank gift card, which is a pleasant surprise for kids, astronomers, teachers, students, astronomy enthusiasts and space dreamers of all ages Main Material: K9 Crystal Size of the ball: 6cm/2.36in. Package Includes: 1 x Solar system crystal ball 1 x Wood-grain plastic base 1 x Gift box 1 x Gift card 1 x Wiping cloth
